title: Global Market: US weekly jobless claims drop more than expected - The Economic Times
summary: The latest report indicates a significant decline in weekly jobless claims across the United States, surpassing economists' predictions. This unexpected improvement suggests a resilient labor market, potentially easing concerns about economic slowdowns.

title: Stock market today: Dow rises, Nasdaq slips as PCE comes in hot, Big Tech falters - Yahoo Finance
summary: Major U.S. stock indices saw mixed performance today, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average gaining while the Nasdaq Composite experienced a decline. This divergence occurred as personal consumption expenditures (PCE) data revealed higher-than-anticipated inflation, causing a stumble among prominent technology stocks.

title: Stock Market Today: Dow Jones, S&P 500, Nasdaq Futures Gain As AI Stocks Rally On Micron’s Strong Outlook - Benzinga
summary: U.S. stock futures showed gains across the Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq indices, driven by a robust rally in artificial intelligence (AI) related stocks. This positive momentum followed Micron Technology's optimistic financial outlook, boosting investor confidence in the tech sector.

title: Stock Market Today: Dow Jones, S&P 500 Futures Gain As Trump Targets Energy Firms Overcharging At The Pum - Benzinga
summary: Futures for the Dow Jones and S&P 500 indices advanced today, influenced by political developments targeting energy companies. Former President Trump's statements regarding alleged overcharging at gas pumps likely impacted market sentiment around the energy sector.

title: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Slide As Rate Hike And Growth Worries Build - Yahoo Finance
summary: S&P 500 futures experienced a downturn as investor anxieties intensified over potential interest rate hikes and broader economic growth concerns. This cautious sentiment reflects ongoing speculation about the Federal Reserve's monetary policy trajectory.

title: Tech Stocks Drive ‘Unnerving’ Sell-Off in Global Markets - The New York Times
summary: Global markets witnessed a significant sell-off, primarily led by a sharp decline in technology stocks, creating an unsettling atmosphere for investors. This widespread downturn highlights growing concerns about valuations and future growth prospects within the tech sector.

title: MARKET_TICKER
Stock market holiday today: Why NSE, BSE are closed on Friday, 26 June - Business Today
summary: Indian stock exchanges, including the NSE and BSE, will observe a trading holiday today, June 26, 2026. This closure is in observance of Muharram, impacting all equity, derivative, and commodity segments.

title: Asian stocks today: Nikkei, Kospi fall up to 8% amid tech stocks selloff - Mint
summary: Major Asian markets, including Japan's Nikkei and South Korea's Kospi, experienced significant declines of up to 8% during today's trading session. This sharp downturn was primarily driven by a widespread selloff in technology stocks across the region.

title: Rajesh Palviya of Axis Sec suggests JSW Infrastructure, Ind-Swift Laboratories, Welspun Living shares to buy next week - Mint
summary: A market expert from Axis Securities has provided recommendations for several stocks, including JSW Infrastructure, Ind-Swift Laboratories, and Welspun Living. These picks are suggested for potential investment opportunities in the upcoming trading week.

title: Global Market: US weekly jobless claims drop more than expected - The Economic Times
summary: The United States saw a larger-than-anticipated decrease in its weekly jobless claims, signaling potential strength in the labor market. This positive economic data could influence global market sentiment and future monetary policy decisions.

title: Career Paths after B.Tech (CSE – Fintech and AI) - LPU
summary: The burgeoning integration of artificial intelligence into financial technology is creating a robust demand for specialized talent. This article explores the diverse and promising career trajectories available to graduates with expertise in both computer science and fintech AI.

title: AI in Fintech: Use Cases, Stats, and Adoption Challenges - appinventiv.com
summary: Artificial intelligence is revolutionizing the fintech sector through various applications, from fraud detection to personalized banking. Despite its significant potential, the widespread adoption of AI in finance faces hurdles related to data privacy, regulatory compliance, and implementation complexity.

title: AI in Fintech Market Size, Industry Share, Forecast to 2034 - Fortune Business Insights
summary: The market for artificial intelligence in financial technology is projected for substantial growth, with detailed insights into its expanding size and industry share. This forecast highlights key trends and drivers expected to shape the sector's trajectory through 2034.

title: Nigeria Central Bank Mandates AI Tools for AML Monitoring - Dabafinance
summary: The Central Bank of Nigeria has issued a directive requiring financial institutions to implement AI-powered solutions for anti-money laundering (AML) monitoring. This mandate underscores a growing global trend among regulators to leverage advanced technology in combating financial crime.

title: How AI Analytics is Transforming Financial Services - Strategy
summary: AI analytics is fundamentally reshaping the financial services landscape by enabling deeper insights into customer behavior, market trends, and risk assessment. This technological shift empowers institutions to make more informed decisions, enhance operational efficiency, and deliver innovative products.

title: India’s AI Revolution Accelerates as Billion-Dollar Investments Reshape the Artificial Intelligence Market
summary: India is experiencing a significant surge in its artificial intelligence sector, fueled by substantial financial commitments. These billion-dollar investments are rapidly transforming the nation's AI landscape and driving innovation across various industries.

title: India’s hosts AI Impact Summit, drawing world leaders, tech giants
summary: India recently convened a major AI Impact Summit, attracting prominent global leaders and leading technology corporations. This event underscored the nation's growing influence in shaping international discussions around artificial intelligence.

title: How India Plans to Redefine Global AI Governance
summary: India is actively developing strategies to influence and potentially reshape the international framework for AI governance. The nation aims to play a pivotal role in establishing new norms and regulations for artificial intelligence on a global scale.

title: India’s next AI leadership moment won’t be driven by GenAI alone
summary: India's future leadership in artificial intelligence is projected to extend beyond the capabilities of generative AI technologies. The country is focusing on a broader spectrum of AI applications and innovations to secure its position in the global AI landscape.

title: Technology and AI to Shape the Future of India’s Logistics Ecosystem: Resham Sahi
summary: Artificial intelligence and advanced technologies are poised to revolutionize India's logistics sector, according to industry expert Resham Sahi. These innovations are expected to streamline operations, enhance efficiency, and drive significant transformation within the supply chain.

title: India’s Global AI Pitch Masks A Troubling Reality At Home
summary: While India promotes its ambitious global AI agenda, a critical report suggests underlying domestic challenges persist within the country's AI development. This perspective highlights potential discrepancies between international aspirations and internal realities concerning artificial intelligence.
